title: I want to interview somebody to help us create workflows to suit our franchise company's needs for tracking rebates and sponsorship revenue dollars
excerpt: I am looking to interview a handful of Monday.com CRM Partners to help us optimize our workflows, automations and invoicing for our franchise company. We have several boards built out but looking for better ways to manag…

posts.author: mbarson (Michael)
posts.cookedHtml: I am looking to interview a handful of Monday.com CRM Partners to help us optimize our workflows, automations and invoicing for our franchise company. We have several boards built out but looking for better ways to manage and track our revenue from rebates and sponsorship dollars.

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @mbarson,

Welcome to the community!

We would welcome a chat to see if we’re a good fit for each other. Please email teameasy@easy-mondays.com so we can arrange connection.

We’re a family owned and run business, focused on outcomes and providing value. Looking forward to learning about you!

Have a great weekend!
Team Easy

posts.author: MondayMex (Gabriel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!
We’d love to help. At Cinapsys, we’re a certified Platinum monday.com Partner and were recently named Services Partner of the Year in LATAM. We specialize in optimizing monday CRM for companies like yours — including workflow automation, invoicing, and revenue tracking (rebates, sponsorships, etc.).

Feel free to reach out to us at info@cinapsys.com — we’d be happy to set up a quick discovery call and explore how we can support your franchise operations.

Looking forward to connecting!

posts.author: diya.deligence (Diya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @mbarson ,
Thanks for sharing — we’d be glad to explore how we can support you.

At Deligence Technologies, we help businesses like yours streamline and optimize CRM workflows, especially around revenue tracking, invoicing, and automation in Monday.com.
We’d love the opportunity to understand your current structure and identify areas for high-impact improvements.

Let’s connect and see how we can make this work better for your team.
sales@deligence.com
Deligence Technologies

posts.author: Colin2 (Colin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Michael,

I am an expert Monday.com consultant and would be glad to do a review and suggest practical improvements.

You can reach out to me on my email here

Colin
